metadata.title: ProMall — Instagram shop management with an AI DM assistant
metadata.description: ProMall is online shop management for Instagram sellers: an AI answers your DMs with real prices and stock and closes the sale with a payment link, while products, orders, inventory and reports live in one panel. Or sell by hand with one clean payment link. 10 days free, no credit card.

demo.metaDescription: Leave your number and your shop's Instagram page — we'll prepare a personalized ProMall demo built around your own shop.
demo.subtitle: Just your phone number and your shop's Instagram page — the ProMall team prepares a demo tailored to your shop and gives you a call.
demo.formSubtitle: Two fields, under half a minute.
demo.phoneError: Enter a valid Iranian mobile number, like 09123456789
demo.instagramError: Enter a valid Instagram handle — a full page link works too
demo.submitError: Something went wrong — please try again in a moment.
demo.privacyNote: Your number is only used to arrange the demo. That's it.
demo.successSubtitle: We'll call you soon to walk through a demo built around your own shop.

call.title: A quick call
call.description: We'll ring you within one business day.

demo.title: A demo of your shop
demo.description: A real panel styled around your own shop — not a canned video.

launch.title: Launch on the spot
launch.description: Love it? We set up your shop in the same session.

hero.badge: An AI salesperson, always in your DMs
hero.description: Build your online store on ProMall and run it from one panel; when you're busy, the AI answers customers with your store's real prices and stock and closes the order right in the DM. Prefer to do it yourself? Sell by hand with one clean payment link.
hero.note: 10 days free to try · No card, no commitment · No technical skills needed
hero.kicker: Online shop management and an Instagram store builder, for the new generation of Iranian businesses
hero.altBackground: A rainy open-air clothing market; a man in a hat browsing racks of coats

dm.reply: Yes, it's in stock! I've set one aside for you — here's your payment link 🙌
dm.confirmed: The order was placed right in the DM and the payment link went out

alwaysOn.label: your DMs get answered, even at peak rush

dmToPay.label: from "how much?" to paid, right in the DM

twoTracks.title: Selling small or selling big, ProMall is with you
twoTracks.subtitle: You don't have to switch on the AI from day one. ProMall is a ladder: at one end you sell by hand yourself, at the other your DMs answer on their own — both ends clean and professional.

byHand.label: By hand, you set it up
byHand.title: Stop collecting addresses by hand in the DM
byHand.description: Instead of piecing together a customer's address and number from a messy chat and then shipping to the wrong place, you build the order yourself and send one clean payment link. The customer fills in their own address and details and pays. Fewer back-and-forths, fewer mistakes, no AI at all.
points: You build the order yourself, and stock is reserved for it the moment you do
You send one link; the customer writes their own address and pays
The address comes from the customer, not a hand-copy or a mis-shipped parcel
Running out of time? Extend the reservation with one button

byAi.label: Smart, it sells for you
byAi.title: Getting busy? Hand the DMs to the AI
byAi.description: When the messages pile up and you can't keep up, you switch on the AI and your DMs answer themselves: it gives your real prices and stock, sends a product catalog, and closes the order with a payment link — the same path you'd take by hand, just automatic.
points: Instant replies to customers, any hour of the day or night
The same payment link, this time sent by the AI itself
Whenever things get sensitive, it hands the conversation to you

twoTracks.footnote: Move from by-hand to smart or back whenever you like; your orders and customers stay right where they are.

bento.title: Everything an online store needs, right here
bento.titleLine1: Everything you need to run your online shop
bento.titleLine2: is right here, in one panel
bento.subtitle: From the first product you add to your end-of-month sales report — it's all in one store management panel, exactly the way an Iranian business needs it.

instagramAi.title: Smart Instagram DMs
instagramAi.description: The AI answers your customers, gives real prices and stock, sends a product catalog, and closes the order with a payment link right inside the DM.

products.title: Products & Variants
products.description: Simple products or color and size; up to 200 variants, each with its own price and stock — it even learns your Persian color and size names.

orders.title: Order Management
orders.description: From the moment an order is placed to the customer's doorstep, you know where each one stands; the system won't let you sell out-of-stock items, and returns and cancellations are handled.

payments.title: Secure Iranian Payments
payments.description: ZarinPal, Zibal and BitPay gateways, plus card-to-card with receipt verification — the exact methods Iranian customers are comfortable with.

reports.title: Live Reports
reports.description: See real sales, real profit (after returns) and your best sellers the moment they happen, in Tehran time, not at month's end.

storefront.title: Your Own Storefront
storefront.description: An online showcase on promall.io with your own name; customers browse with no login, place orders and pay.

inventory.title: Online Inventory
inventory.description: Stock updates itself with every order, syncs live across all your devices, and warns you before it runs low.

customers.title: Customer Profiles
customers.description: Your customer list is built from real paid orders; see who's VIP, who's drifting away, and win them back.

print.title: Auto Invoice Printing
print.description: Every paid order prints its invoice automatically on your store's printer — up to 9 order cards on a single A4 sheet.

realtime.title: Instant In-Panel Alerts
realtime.description: A new order, a fresh DM, low stock — they appear live on every open panel the same second.

instagram.title: An Instagram sales agent that doesn't just chat, it sells
instagram.subtitle: A customer asks in your DMs and ProMall's AI sales assistant answers with your store's real data — accurate, in your own tone, sending product photos and closing the order with a payment link; at any hour of the day or night.

alwaysOn.title: Instant replies, 24/7
alwaysOn.description: It understands what the customer means, not just the words; no message goes unanswered, and the customer gets a full reply before they move on to the next page.

grounded.title: Connected to your real store data
grounded.description: Prices, stock and product details are read straight from your panel, not guessed; it understands you even through typos and slang, hands off to you when it can't answer, and never makes anything up.

personality.title: Its tone and personality are yours to set
personality.description: Give it a name; formal, friendly or playful; Persian or bilingual; with emoji or without — however your brand speaks. Every time you answer yourself, it learns from you.

handoff.title: It closes the order, and hands off when things get sensitive
handoff.description: It finalizes size and color, checks and reserves stock live, builds the order and sends the payment link; when a customer is upset or a payment is sensitive, it hands off to you — and you can switch it back to the AI whenever you want.

create.title: Build your store
create.description: Sign up, pick your store's address on promall.io, and get going fast — no technical skills, everything in Persian.

stock.title: Add your products
stock.description: Enter products, prices and stock; color and size variants and categories organize themselves.

sell.title: Sell, by hand or with AI
sell.description: Either build the order yourself and send a payment link, or connect your Instagram and let the AI answer your DMs — the choice is yours.

reports.title: Decide with numbers, not guesswork
reports.subtitle: ProMall's reporting dashboard shows real sales, real profit, your best sellers and customer behavior in plain terms, so you know what actually makes money — in Tehran time, not at month's end. Excel and PDF exports are ready for your accountant too.

pricing.title: A plan for every business size
pricing.subtitle: Start with a 10-day free trial, no credit card; upgrade whenever you grow and only pay the difference.
pricing.footnote: Every plan starts with a 10-day free trial, no credit card. Upgrade or downgrade from your panel anytime, and the price difference is prorated.

free.name: 10-day trial
free.description: Try every Professional feature free for 10 days
features: Build your store and add products
A dedicated payment link for customers
After 10 days, choose your own plan

professional.name: Professional
professional.description: The best choice for stores that are growing
features: Auto invoice printing on your store's printer
Sales and profit reports + Excel and PDF export
First 10 days free, no credit card

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For large businesses that need teams and access levels
features: Instant alerts and in-panel support tickets

faq.title: Whatever you're wondering, the answer's here

manageShop.question: How do I manage my online shop with ProMall?
manageShop.answer: Everything your shop needs lives in one panel: products, inventory, orders, payments and sales reports, plus an Instagram DM inbox your AI assistant can answer for you. There's no need to juggle separate apps — from first setup to delivering an order, you run the whole shop from one place.

whatIsOnlineShop.question: What is an Instagram online shop, and how is ProMall different?
whatIsOnlineShop.answer: An online shop is simply the store you run on Instagram, taking orders through DMs. ProMall is more than a chat bot: its AI answers with your real prices and stock and closes the sale with a payment link, builds you a hosted storefront on promall.io, and keeps your orders, inventory and reports in one place.

noTech.question: Do I need to know any programming to use ProMall?
noTech.answer: Not at all. We built ProMall for shop owners, not programmers. You sign up, add your products, and your store is ready — everything is in Persian and dead simple. You don't even need to turn on the AI at first; you can just build the order and send a payment link.

withoutAi.question: Do I have to use the AI?
withoutAi.answer: No, it's not required at all. You can build the order by hand yourself and just send the customer a clean payment link so they fill in their own address and pay. When you get busy, that's when you switch on the AI to let your DMs answer themselves. The choice is yours.

howAi.question: How does the AI know what to answer?
howAi.answer: It answers from your store's real data: products, prices, stock, and anything you've taught it. You can even point it at your website or Instagram page so it reads and learns on its own. It makes nothing up, hands off to you when it can't answer, and you set the tone however you like.

instagramSafe.question: Is connecting Instagram safe?
instagramSafe.answer: Yes, rest assured. The connection is made in a few clicks through Meta's official gateway, and your token is stored encrypted. You can disconnect anytime you want.

accounting.question: Does ProMall replace an accounting app for my online shop?
accounting.answer: For day-to-day shop bookkeeping, yes: sales, real profit after returns and cancellations, and your inventory value are always up to date — no late-night spreadsheet sessions. And for your accountant or official ledger, you export Excel and PDF reports with one click.

payments.question: How do customers pay?
payments.answer: You have two methods: an online bank gateway (ZarinPal, Zibal, BitPay) and card-to-card with receipt upload. The online gateway confirms the payment itself and the order is approved; for card-to-card, the customer sends the receipt and you approve it with one click in your panel.

print.question: How does printing invoices on the store's printer work?
print.answer: You install a small Windows app on the store computer, pair it with a 6-character code that's valid for thirty seconds, and from then on every paid order prints its invoice automatically. Up to 9 order cards on one A4 sheet, with your own logo.

switchPlans.question: Can I change my plan later?
switchPlans.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade from your panel at any moment; on an upgrade only the price difference is charged, and your account and history stay untouched.

support.question: Who helps me if I run into trouble?
support.answer: You open a support ticket from your panel, attach a screenshot of the issue if you like, and follow it live until it's resolved; on higher plans your ticket is handled with higher priority.

cta.title: Every unanswered DM is a lost sale
cta.subtitle: Start free today; build your store, send a clean payment link — or hand your DMs to an AI that never sleeps. 10 days free, no credit card.
cta.note: No credit card · 10 days free · Cancel anytime

footer.description: An Instagram store builder and AI-powered online store management panel; built for Iranian businesses.

direct.title: DMs become a salesperson
direct.description: Build the order by hand and send a payment link, or switch on ProMall's AI to answer with your store's real data, send a catalog, give prices and stock, and close the order with a payment link right there in the DM.

orders.title: Order to payment, in one place
orders.description: Build it yourself or let the AI; a payment link goes out, the customer fills in their address. ZarinPal, Zibal and card-to-card with receipt verification are all ready; returns and cancellations restore stock automatically.

logistics.title: Inventory and invoices, automated
logistics.description: Stock updates with every sale and syncs across all your devices, low-stock alerts fire, and invoices for paid orders print on your store's printer the moment they come in.

insight.title: Numbers talk, not guesses
insight.description: Real sales, real profit, your best sellers and VIP customers are right in front of you the moment they happen, in Tehran time — reports that speak a merchant's language, with exports you can take away.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.
privacy.introduction: At Promall, we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information. This Privacy Policy describes how PROMAL LABORATORIES ("we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, and shares information when you use our online store management platform and related services.

informationCollected.title: Information We Collect
content: Account Information: When you create an account, we collect your name, email address, phone number, and password.
Business Information: Store name, business address, product listings, pricing information, and inventory data.
Transaction Data: Order history, payment information (processed securely through third-party payment providers), shipping addresses, and customer communications.
Usage Information: How you interact with our platform, including pages visited, features used, time spent on the platform, and device information.
Technical Data: IP address, browser type, operating system, device identifiers, and cookies for analytics and service improvement.
Third-Party Data: Information from integrated services such as Facebook, Instagram, or other platforms you connect to your Promall account.

howWeUse.title: How We Use Your Information
content: Provide Services: To operate and maintain your online store, process orders, manage inventory, and facilitate payments.
Improve Experience: To personalize your experience, provide customer support, and improve our platform features.
Communication: To send you important updates, service announcements, promotional offers (with your consent), and respond to your inquiries.
Analytics: To analyze usage patterns, monitor performance, and develop new features that better serve your needs.
Security: To detect, prevent, and address technical issues, fraud, and unauthorized access.
Legal Compliance: To comply with applicable laws, regulations, and legal processes.

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing and Third Parties
content: Service Providers: We share data with trusted third-party providers who assist us in operating our platform, including payment processors, hosting services, and analytics providers.
Business Partners: With your consent, we may share data with integrated platforms (e.g., social media, shipping carriers) to enable features you request.
Legal Requirements: We may disclose information when required by law, court order, or to protect our rights and safety.
Business Transfers: In the event of a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your information may be transferred as part of that transaction.
We do not sell your personal information to third parties for their marketing purposes.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
content: Encryption: All data transmitted between your device and our servers is encrypted using industry-standard SSL/TLS protocols.
Secure Storage: Your data is stored on secure servers with restricted access and regular security audits.
Access Controls: We implement strict access controls to ensure only authorized personnel can access your information.
Regular Backups: We perform regular backups to prevent data loss and ensure business continuity.
Incident Response: We have procedures in place to detect, report, and respond to data security incidents promptly.

dataDeletion.title: Your Rights and Data Deletion
content: Access: You can request a copy of your personal data that we hold.
Correction: You can update or correct your account information at any time through your account settings.
Deletion: You can request deletion of your account and associated data by contacting us at privacy@promall.io or through your account settings.
Export: You can export your data in a machine-readable format before account deletion.
Opt-out: You can opt out of promotional communications at any time by clicking the unsubscribe link in our emails.
Upon receiving a deletion request, we will remove your personal data within 30 days, except where we are required to retain it for legal or legitimate business purposes.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, or if you wish to exercise your privacy rights, please contact us:

privacy.footerNote: This Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the "Last Updated" date.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: The ground rules for using Promall. Please read them carefully before creating an account or using our services.
terms.introduction: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Promall platform, websites, APIs, and related services (the "Services") operated by PROMAL LABORATORIES ("Promall", "we", "us"). By creating an account or using the Services, you agree to be bound by these Terms and by our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, you must not use the Services.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
content: By accessing or using Promall in any way — including signing up, browsing, integrating a social channel, or running an automated assistant — you agree to these Terms.
If you use the Services on behalf of a business, you represent that you are authorized to bind that business, and "you" refers to both you and that business.

We may update these Terms from time to time. Material changes will be communicated by posting the updated Terms on this page and revising the "Last Updated" date. Continued use after changes means you accept the updated Terms.
If any provision of these Terms is held to be unenforceable, the remaining provisions will remain in full effect.

accounts.title: Accounts & Eligibility
content: You must be at least 18 years old (or the legal age of majority where you reside) to create a Promall account.
You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration and to keep it up to date.
You are responsible for safeguarding your credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account. Notify us immediately at security@promall.io if you suspect unauthorized access.
One person or legal entity may not maintain more than one free account. We may suspend duplicate accounts at our discretion.
You are responsible for ensuring that anyone who accesses the Services through your account complies with these Terms.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable Use
content: You will not use Promall to send spam, unsolicited bulk messages, deceptive content, or any communication that violates applicable anti-spam or consumer-protection laws.

You will not use the Services to sell, promote, or distribute illegal goods, counterfeit items, controlled substances, weapons, sexually explicit content, or any content that infringes intellectual-property rights.
You will not attempt to reverse-engineer, decompile, scrape at scale, probe for vulnerabilities, or otherwise interfere with the security or integrity of the Services.
You will not impersonate any person, misrepresent your affiliation, or use Promall to harass, threaten, or harm others.
You will not use the Services to train competing machine-learning models or to systematically extract data for resale.
You will comply with all applicable laws and regulations, including data-protection, export-control, and tax laws.

payments.title: Subscriptions & Payments
content: Some features of Promall are offered on a paid subscription basis. Pricing, billing cycle, and included usage are presented at checkout and may be updated with reasonable notice.
All fees are charged in advance and are non-refundable except where required by law. You authorize us to charge your chosen payment method on each renewal until you cancel.
You can cancel a paid plan at any time from your account settings. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period; the Services remain available until then.
If a payment fails or is reversed, we may suspend paid features until the balance is resolved. Persistent non-payment may result in account termination.
We are not responsible for fees charged by your bank, card issuer, or payment provider.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
content: Promall, including its software, design, branding, and documentation, is owned by PROMAL LABORATORIES and is protected by intellectual-property laws. We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the Services in accordance with these Terms.

You retain all rights to the content you upload (products, images, messages, customer data). By uploading content, you grant us a worldwide, royalty-free license to host, process, transmit, and display that content solely to provide the Services to you.
You represent that you have all rights necessary to upload your content and that it does not infringe any third-party rights.
Any feedback or suggestions you provide may be used by us without obligation or compensation.
Trademarks, logos, and service marks displayed on the Services are the property of Promall or their respective owners and may not be used without prior written permission.

thirdPartyIntegrations.title: Third-Party Integrations (Meta, Instagram, and Others)
content: Promall lets you connect third-party services such as Meta (Facebook, Instagram), payment processors, shipping carriers, and analytics providers. Your use of those services is governed by their own terms and privacy policies, including the Meta Platform Terms and Instagram API Terms where applicable.

When you connect a Meta-owned account, you authorize Promall to access, store, and process the data you have explicitly granted via the Meta permissions screen — solely to deliver the features you have requested (for example, replying to direct messages or syncing comments).
You are responsible for ensuring that you have the legal right to connect any third-party account and to share that account's data with Promall.

Promall is not responsible for the availability, accuracy, or behavior of third-party services. If a third-party service changes or removes an API, the related feature may be limited or removed without liability to you.

You may disconnect any third-party integration at any time from your account settings. Upon disconnection we will stop pulling new data from that service; previously synchronized data is handled in accordance with our Privacy Policy and your deletion requests.

termination.title: Suspension & Termination
content: You may stop using Promall and delete your account at any time from your account settings or by contacting support@promall.io.

We may suspend or terminate your access immediately, without prior notice, if you breach these Terms, create risk or legal exposure for Promall, or use the Services in a way that could harm other users or third parties.
Upon termination, your right to use the Services ends. We will retain or delete your data in accordance with our Privacy Policy and applicable legal-retention requirements.
Sections that by their nature should survive termination — including intellectual property, disclaimers, limitation of liability, and indemnification — will survive.

disclaimers.title: Disclaimers & Limitation of Liability
content: The Services are provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, whether express or implied, including warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.
We do not warrant that the Services will be uninterrupted, error-free, secure, or free from viruses or other harmful components. You are responsible for backing up critical data.

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Promall and its affiliates will not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits, revenue, data, or goodwill, arising out of or in connection with your use of the Services.

Our total aggregate liability for any claim arising out of these Terms will not exceed the greater of (a) the fees you paid us in the twelve months preceding the event giving rise to the claim, or (b) one hundred US dollars (USD 100).
You agree to indemnify and hold Promall harmless from any claims arising out of your content, your use of the Services, or your breach of these Terms.
These Terms are governed by the laws applicable to PROMAL LABORATORIES's place of incorporation, without regard to its conflict-of-laws rules.
